metadata.reference: G. A. Ermolaev, Yu. V. Stebunov, A. A. Vyshnevyy, D. E. Tatarkin, D. I. Yakubovsky, S. M. Novikov, D. G. Baranov, T. Shegai, A. Y. Nikitin, A. V. Arsenin, V. S. Volkov. metadata.comments:
Ordinary ray (o).
Optical constants of in-plane component of dielectric tensor of bulk MoS2 measured by spectroscopic ellipsometry.
